description.value:
This iridescent egg is disorienting to look at, constantly out of focus and overlaid by two afterimages. The trinary egg contains energy that doesn't exist in this reality, but forms a trinary with life and death. Pulled from an alternate reality where this trinary is the natural order of things, the trinary egg is magically resonant, enabling a spellcaster to leverage the trinary egg's power to balance the forces of life and death.

Activate—Trinary Resonance 1

Frequency once per day

Effect If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell with the vitality or void trait that deals damage or restores Hit Points, the trinary egg resonates with that spell, balancing the scales between life and death. If the spell deals damage, the trinary egg restores a number of Hit Points to you equal to twice the spell's rank. If the spell restores Hit Points, select a single target within 30 feet. The trinary egg deals persistent force damage to the target equal to the spell's rank. Cracks appear in the trinary egg's surface.

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-21: Breaching the Wreck
